curation_notes: Patch commit is merge 65d7070 of PR free5gc/udm#78. Two source files changed: internal/sbi/api_httpcallback.go (added NotifyItems validation, SUPI format validation, fixed route path from /sdm-subscriptions to /:supi/sdm-subscriptions) and internal/sbi/processor/notifier.go (added nil check after UdmUeFindBySupi, added nil check for problemDetails). The core vulnerability is in notifier.go where the ok return value from UdmUeFindBySupi was discarded with _, allowing a nil ue pointer to be dereferenced. The api_httpcallback.go changes add defense-in-depth input validation. Spot-checked ue_context_management.go which has the same discarded ok pattern in multiple places, but these are in different request flows with different attack surfaces; kept locations focused on the advisory-described path. Pre-assigned class null-deref confirmed by CWE-476 and patch diff.
